title: Festive Tunisian Cream of Tartar Tagine
description: A festive and sweet dish featuring cream of tartar in a low-fat-friendly version of the traditional tagine, perfect for dessert or as a festive treat.
instructions: In a small saucepan, mix together cream of tartar and baking powder.
Add heavy cream to the mixture in the saucepan. Heat over medium heat until it starts to boil, stirring occasionally.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 5 minutes or until slightly thickened.
Stir in sugar, almond extract, and vanilla extract. Remove from heat and let sit for a few minutes to cool down.
In another saucepan, bring water to a boil with tapioca pearls added, stirring gently to avoid breaking the pearls.
Let the pearls cook for about 10-15 minutes until they are cooked but not soft.
Fold the cream mixture into the cooled pearl mixture. Serve immediately or refrigerate if serving later.
